FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f2da2d72e50>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-11T16:17:25Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-11T16:15:40Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-11T16:17:25Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-11T16:15:40Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/11 16:18:55.799598027 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799605040 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799660564 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799662037 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799682505 {
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799683497 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799694778 new <- list()
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799695689 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799709084 new$width <- width
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799710227 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799720115 new$height <- height
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799720546 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799728871 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799758817 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799774607 new$title <- title
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799777783 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799793772 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799794825 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799808871 new$version <- version
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799809332 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799817978 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799818398 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799826554 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799827034 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799835280 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799835711 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799843335 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799843756 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799851831 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799852432 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799868071 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799868532 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799877419 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799877849 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799886596 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799887026 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799911412 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799912594 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799929236 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799930307 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799941098 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799941548 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799949954 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799950676 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799959181 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799959622 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799968709 new$author <- author
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799969160 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799979569 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799980060 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799990209 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/11 16:18:55.799990670 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800000148 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800000609 "default"))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800010096 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800010597 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800019053 }
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800019504 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800037407 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800038560 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800054349 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800055411 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800065931 }
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800066372 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800074476 }
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800074907 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800082802 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800083263 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800091989 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800092430 domain = NA)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800101667 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800102118 }
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800110123 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800110554 old$family <- family
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800119591 }
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800120062 version <- old$version
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800127606 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800128047 "2.0")
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800136011 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800136452 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800150909 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800151681 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800167861 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800168983 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800183270 domain = NA)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800183781 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800193369 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800193870 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800204940 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800205391 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800216692 old$author)
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800217143 invisible()
2026/06/11 16:18:55.800224727 }
